items.title: McLaren CEO: Teams are 'writing checks' to get into F1
items.description: The sport of Formula One is big business — and British team McLaren Racing is capitalizing.

items.title: Is The Vanguard Total Stock Market Index Fund a Buy?
items.description: With a 0.03% expense ratio and broad exposure to the full U.S. market, this boring fund keeps beating flashier alternatives by doing absolutely nothing special.

items.title: 'My early skincare formulas were stolen – now I'm known as the Queen's bee venom facialist'
items.description: How Deborah Mitchell went from mobile beauty therapist to overnight success with her multimillion-pound brand Heaven Skincare, including bee venom facials.

items.title: Tariffs Aren’t Hitting Earnings—Yet. Why That Might Not Last.
items.description: The bottom line is that aggregate corporate margins remain at high levels, and consumers have been largely shielded from rising prices.
